title: Link notification afb.notification.link.v1
description: AFB-side MQTT notification payload published to <topic_base>/links/<user_id> for a BF connectivity/runtime incident or recovery the user opted into. Consumed by the AFB informer daemon (Telegram/email). NOT an AsyncAPI wire message — never crosses the AFB<->BF channel, not signed. `timestamp` is added by MQTTPublisher at publish time; `at` is the AFB-observed transition time. `display` carries human-readable strings pre-rendered by AFB backend.

notification_id.description: Stable per-incident event id for informer-side deduplication.

daemon_state.description: Current BF runtime state as normalized by AFB (for example: active, off_hours, degraded, recovering, suspended).

at.description: ISO-8601 time when AFB observed the transition and emitted this notification payload.

incident_started_at.description: ISO-8601 time when the tracked incident originally started, useful on recovery notifications.

health.description: Optional subset or full copy of the current daemon health payload for richer informer formatting.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 publish time; added by MQTTPublisher, not by the link notification builder.
